title: taraxacum septentrionale
intro: Taraxacum septentrionale, also known as the Northern dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the northern hemisphere. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum septentrionale include its ability to support digestion, reduce blood pressure, and act as a diuretic, making it a useful remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol.
